name: Zesty Orange Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except lettuce leaves in a bowl.
2. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
3. Toss the salad on the lettuce leaves just before serving.
Note: This recipe is from the American Diabetes Association's Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, published in 1986. It was shared and not tested by Elizabeth Rodier in November 1993.
